name: @drakon-systems/agent-optimizer-openclaw-plugin
description: OpenClaw plugin exposing agent-optimizer's audit/plan/apply/rollback/scan verbs as agent tools. Mutating tools are approval-gated.

scripts.plugin:build: npm run build && openclaw plugins build --entry ./dist/index.js
scripts.plugin:validate: npm run build && openclaw plugins validate --entry ./dist/index.js
